summary: Recap→Hero→Action→Reinforcement loop polish testing completed. All 4 areas verified: 1) Hero wording is concise and scannable, 2) Priority conflict handling works correctly, 3) Reinforcement messages align with recap context, 4) 'Why this?' expandable panel shows priority factors with colored dots.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Hero subtitle is concise - shows 'Overdue 3d — also your recap's top focus' (not verbose)
PASS: 'Why this?' button appears next to owner badge on hero card (data-testid='hero-why-btn')
PASS: 'Why this?' panel expands showing 'Priority factors' heading (data-testid='hero-why-panel')
PASS: Panel shows 3 factors: 'Overdue by 3 days', 'Top priority in Momentum Recap', '8 days since last activity'
PASS: Factors have colored dots (red for overdue, purple for recap, blue for staleness)
PASS: Panel collapses on second click of 'Why this?' button
PASS: Panel auto-collapses when carousel navigates to next card
PASS: Carousel navigation works - shows 4 hero items (Emory, UF, Stanford, UCLA)
PASS: Second hero shows 'Flagged in recap — keep pushing' (concise secondary recap reason)
PASS: RecapTeaser card displays correctly with heated/cooling counts and View Recap link
PASS: Pipeline (kanban) view works - shows columns: Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offered
PASS: RecapTeaser is hidden in Pipeline/Kanban view (correctly shows only in Priority view)
PASS: No JavaScript console errors detected
PASS: Hero action text matches recap priority - 'Re-engage with Emory University'
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data - Emma Chen has 5 programs with Emory as top recap priority (overdue 3d + recap top + 8 days stale)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Polish pass verified. Hero wording refined from verbose to concise. 'Why this?' explainability panel fully functional with animation (pm-why-in keyframe). Priority/Pipeline view toggle works correctly. RecapTeaser hidden in Pipeline view. All recap-aware reinforcement messages working.
